## ERT1.1. Effective use of reserved or segregated local airspace (PI#9)

BELGIUM and LUXEMBOURG reports a ratio of **66.32%**

FRANCE reports a ratio of **94.63%**

GERMANY reports a ratio of **88.43%**

LUXEMBOURG -- not applicable (see BELGIUM and LUXEMBOURG)

NETHERLANDS reports a ratio of **94.82%**

SWITZERLAND reports a ratio of **92.47%**

MUAC -- not applicable
